free_text: The modal structure of fragment mass and energy yields
from the 10.3-30.0 MeV proton induced fission of 232Th
Layers of thickness 20-40 ug/cm2 made from
evaporation on 60 ug/cm2 backings of Al2O3.
The investigated isotope 235U was enriched to >99.98%.
